name: Media Uploader
description: Upload media files (individually or in batches) to your Jellyfin server from a standalone page with an interactive UI.
overview: A Jellyfin plugin that lets users upload media files directly through a standalone web page with an interactive UI. Configure a base upload path and a set of named destination presets; choose a destination (and optional subfolder) per upload.

versions.changelog:
- Multiple file uploads and folder (batch) uploads
- Configurable base upload path with user-defined destination presets
- Optional subfolder per upload
- Automatic library scan after upload
